zh.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾素爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Sothill於大約1375年出生在英國越可爾利朋 利波迪時，她的父親Henry Sothill31歲，母親Mrs. Henry Sothill32歲。她於1403年與Thomas Markenfield在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國英格蘭越可爾素爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾馬肯費爾德 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Sothill于大约1375年出生在英国越可爾利朋 利波迪时，她的父亲Henry Sothill31岁，母亲Mrs. Henry Sothill32岁。她于1403年与Thomas Markenfield在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国英格兰越可爾素爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾馬肯費爾德 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Soothill (in Dewsbury, WR Yorks).

variants.name: Suttle
meanings: nickname from Middle English sotil, sutel ‘subtle, clever, cunning’ (Old French sotil).
habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Southwell
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Sothill was born about 1375, in Ripon Liberty, Yorkshire, England, her father, Henry Sothill, was 31 and her mother, Mrs. Henry Sothill, was 32. She married Thomas Markenfield in 1403, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1430, in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Sothill est née environ 1375, à Ripon Liberty, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Sothill, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry Sothill, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Markenfield en 1403, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Soothill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Markenfield Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Markenfield Hall, Ripon, North Yorkshire: Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Sothill um 1375 in Ripon Liberty, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sothill 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Henry Sothill 32. Sie hat 1403 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Thomas Markenfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Markenfield nel 1403, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1430, nel Soothill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sothillが約1375年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオン リバートイで生まれた時，父Henry Sothillは31歳，母Mrs. Henry Sothillは32歳であった。1403年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでThomas Markenfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイルで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマーケンフィールド ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sothill(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 요르크실르 리폰 리버티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sothill(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Henry Sothill(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Thomas Markenfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소스이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 마크필드 홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Sothill nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Ripon Liberty, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Sothill, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry Sothill, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Markenfield em 1403, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Sothill родилась около 1375 г. в местности рипон либирти, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Sothill было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry Sothill, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Markenfield в 1403 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности сутилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности маркенфиелд холл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Markenfield en 1403, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1430, en Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
